rejection_reason: tone: forbidden_word — 'world-class' appears in email body. Superlatives without evidence damage credibility. Replace with a specific customer result.
text:
Subject: World-class automation for {{company}}

Hi {{first_name}},

At FlowAI we provide world-class AI automation to busy professionals who want to get more done.

Our world-class platform integrates with your existing tools and our world-class support team is available around the clock.

Would {{company}} benefit from a world-class solution like ours? Happy to walk you through it.
